critical_page_1_facts: all MDF, IDF and AV rooms maintain 70F and less than 60 percent RH
install ground busbar minimum 18 inches AFF with 6 inches clear all sides
minimum #6 AWG green grounding conductor to each equipment rack and bonded ladder rack
pull box for every 100 feet of straight conduit run and every two 90 degree bends
provide pull string in all conduits
all conduits EMT unless otherwise noted
Wi-Fi vendor responsible for wireless site survey before ceiling closure
SC fiber connectors unless otherwise noted
multimode visible portion aqua and singlemode visible portion yellow
drawing index includes T000 through T906
critical_page_2_symbol_tables: access control and intercom symbol legend
critical_device_and_outlet_types: single button emergency phone system station
mini dome single lens camera ceiling mounted
mini dome single lens camera wall mounted
fixed bullet style camera wall mounted
coax plus data plus fiber outlet
critical_color_and_termination_facts: telephone and data jacks category 6 RJ-45 terminated T568B
admin outlet cables terminate on dedicated admin patch panels
POS outlet cables terminate on dedicated POS patch panels
critical_floorplan_facts: wireless nodes have 15 foot service loop and mount within reach of accessible ceiling or behind access panel
wireless nodes surface mounted on some sheets
zigbee hub access point location mounted above ceiling next to access panel
homerun all cables on each level to designated MDF or IDF room
from MDF below to IDF-2 above relation
key card reader shown for coordination only, final by door hardware schedule
roof plan has proposed satellite dish location with weatherhead and pull string
critical_riser_facts: T901 conduit riser includes conduit rules, meet-me box, sleeves, conduits, pull box, weatherhead
T902 cabling riser includes PP, FIC, 110 blocks, 12-count fiber, CAT-6 cables per IDF, patch-to-punch cross connect
T903 MATV riser includes 7 RG-11, pull box, weatherhead, 10 foot slack, outdoor rated cable, public area TV note
critical_equipment_room_and_detail_facts: T900 includes MDF/Data room layout, 110 block elevation, chase backboard elevation, rack elevation, rack interconnectivity, grounding riser diagram, IDF-2 and IDF-4 layouts
T904 patch panels 48-port density 2U and admin outlet data cables on dedicated patch panels
T904 racks supported overhead with 18x6 cable tray, ladder rack allowed in low ceilings
T904 all IDF and MDF cross-connect fields use 110 blocks
T904 UPS minimum 15 minutes for all IT equipment in IDF and MDF rooms
T905 CCTV system has complete separate dedicated network with UPS-powered edge/core switching
T905 cameras record on motion with storage retention requirements
T906 includes above-ceiling outlet, grounding detail, POS/admin/wireless node installation details
T906 includes category cable home run to IDF detail semantics
graph_expectations: camera_instance matches_legend cctv_symbol and constrained_by dedicated_cctv_network
